title: Evidence-backed handoff packets (handoffs collection + 3 MCP tools, 41→44)
success_invariant: A member can hand off work with full investigation context; the recipient sees it via to_member 'me'; privacy rules hold at both MCP and database (RLS) level

criteria.criterion: Migration 012 + PB 009 mirror written; handoffs in DEFAULT_SCOPED_COLLECTIONS, EXPECTED_COLLECTIONS, COLLECTION_SCHEMAS
HandoffRecord type; 3 tools registered (44 total); currentOwnerId exposed on proxy + types
handoff_create defaults shared; private+to_member≠self rejected with clear error
criteria.evidence: tests/handoff-tools.test.ts (13 tests) + team-e2e.mjs 'private handoff to another member is rejected' / 'private self-handoff allowed'

criteria.criterion: handoff_update stamps accepted_at/completed_at; handoff_list filters to_member/status/task_id, 'me' resolution
criteria.evidence: team-e2e.mjs 'bob accepts: accepted_at stamped', 'bob completes: completed_at stamped', 'bob sees the open handoff via to_member me'

criteria.criterion: Unit tests green; team-e2e.mjs extended (count 44 + handoff lifecycle + privacy) and green
criteria.evidence: vitest 99/99; team-e2e.mjs 37/37 (was 36+1 fail before markdown.ts objects-in-list serializer fix)

criteria.criterion: 012 applied to live e2e project, idempotent (applied twice)
criteria.evidence: psql run 1: CREATE TABLE...GRANT clean; run 2: all IF NOT EXISTS skips, DROP/CREATE POLICY + GRANT re-applied clean

criteria.criterion: supabase e2e green with 44 tools; mvp-test-plan count NOT changed
criteria.evidence: team-e2e-supabase.mjs 22/22 live (project levqrbrwslnkeuxljkhz); mvp-test-plan.mjs:97 still asserts 41 (pins published 0.8.0)

criteria.criterion: hardened e2e: bob JWT reads alice shared handoff, 0 rows for alice private handoff via raw PostgREST
criteria.evidence: team-e2e-supabase-hardened.mjs 15/15 live — 'bob direct REST sees ZERO alice private handoffs (RLS fails closed)', 'bob direct REST CAN read shared handoffs'

criteria.criterion: TEAM-SETUP.md handoff workflow section; README tool table/counts; package.json description 41→44
criteria.evidence: docs/TEAM-SETUP.md 'Handoff packets (passing work between members)' section; README.md Tools (44) + Handoffs row; package.json description updated; scripts/smoke-test.mjs EXPECTED_TOOL_COUNT=44

criteria.criterion: dist/ rebuilt (scratch dir → rsync), verify-dist PASS, typecheck clean
criteria.evidence: verify-dist: PASS fatal=0 missing=0 classA=0 allowB=0 mapWarn=122; tsc --noEmit clean

regressions_checked.evidence: tests/markdown-roundtrip.test.ts 'still roundtrips plain scalar lists (no regression)' green
handoffs added to BOTH EXPECTED_COLLECTIONS and COLLECTION_SCHEMAS in same change
